product_name: Greek Yogurt Black Cherry on the Bottom
ingredients_text: Cultured nonfat milk, black cherries, cane sugar, water, fruit pectin, cherry juice concentrate, natural flavors, locust bean gum, guar gum, lemon juice concentrate. 6 live and active cultures: S. Thermophilus, L. Bulgaricus, L. Acidophilus, bobant.com Bifidus, L. Casei, and L. Rhamnosus.
